definition: Each listed product flow should have Appium coverage under mnemonic-style login (recovery phrase / warmup). Seedless is not in `walletModes` until seedless Appium exists — add it here when that suite lands. Ledger is omitted (not automatable in Appium). Unknown `flows` keys are ignored with a console warning (see SPEC_COVERS_FLOW_MOBILE in e2e-feature-coverage.js).
